summary: Full UI audit completed for The Doggy Company production site. All 5 test areas PASSED: About page Kouros image correct (black dog), Shop 'For You' tab works without (0), Emergency guest form functional, Pillar pages loading products/services.

Emergency guest form shows contact fields for non-logged users. Pillar pages (Dine, Celebrate) load products and services successfully.
